subcodes.first_line: The Holy Spirit proclaimeth: O Concourse of the seen and unseen! The Promised Day is come, and He Who was desired hath appeared [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد ینادی روح القدس یا ملا الغیب و الشهود قد اتی یوم الموعود و ظهر المقصود
